ActorId.description:
Stable identifier of the actor doing the fucking-around. Consequences are
partitioned by this value and never rebalance to another actor.

Consequence.description:
A materialized finding-out. Immutable. Non-appealable.
Mirror of `asyncapi.yaml#/components/schemas/Consequence`.

consequenceId.description: Deduplication key. The universe retries; you must not double-count.
consequenceId.title: consequenceId

deliveryAttempt.description: Which delivery attempt this is. See Law 3.
deliveryAttempt.title: deliveryAttempt

proportionality.description: The fabric's own assessment of its work.
proportionality.title: proportionality

severity.description:
Computed per the Conservation Law from the integral of recklessness over
the causal thread. MAY exceed 11; the input scale is capped, the output
scale is not. This asymmetry is the entire lesson.
severity.title: severity

Consequence.title: Consequence

actorId.description:
Stable identifier of the actor doing the fucking-around. Consequences are
partitioned by this value and never rebalance to another actor.
actorId.title: actorId

fafoId.description: The open causal thread being escalated.
fafoId.title: fafoId

justification.description: Preserved verbatim for the incident report.
justification.title: justification

newRecklessness.description: Must exceed the thread's current recklessness. It always does.
newRecklessness.title: newRecklessness

EscalateOutput.description: Result of `escalate`. The integral has been recalculated.

fafoId.description:
The Thread of Causality. Links every event in a single
around → warning → escalation → findout → lesson lifecycle.
Assigned by the fabric at intent declaration; immutable thereafter.
fafoId.title: fafoId

Escalation.description:
A recklessness increase on an open causal thread.
Mirror of `asyncapi.yaml#/components/schemas/Escalation`.

justification.description: Preserved verbatim for the incident report.
justification.title: justification

newRecklessness.description: Must exceed the thread's current recklessness. It always does.
newRecklessness.title: newRecklessness

FafoCategory.description:
The recognized domains of fucking around. Extensible; regrettably.
Mirror of `asyncapi.yaml#/components/schemas/FafoCategory` — extend it
there first; this type follows.
FafoCategory.title: FafoCategory

FafoErrorCode.description:
fafo-mcp JSON-RPC error codes. Error `data` MUST include `fafoId` where a
thread exists, and MAY include a FoaasMessage restating the error in the
ancestral format.

FafoId.description:
The Thread of Causality. Links every event in a single
around → warning → escalation → findout → lesson lifecycle.
Assigned by the fabric at intent declaration; immutable thereafter.

FafoToolName.description: The complete, closed set of fafo-mcp tool names.

FindOutInput.description:
Input for `find_out` — polling companion (B3) for hosts without
resource-subscription support. They exist; we forgive them.

actorId.description:
Stable identifier of the actor doing the fucking-around. Consequences are
partitioned by this value and never rebalance to another actor.
actorId.title: actorId

afterSequence.description: Return only consequences with a header sequence greater than this.
afterSequence.title: afterSequence

fafoId.description: Restrict to a single causal thread.
fafoId.title: fafoId

FindOutOutput.description: Result of `find_out`. Deduplicate by `consequenceId`; the universe retries.

pending.description: True if consequences exist that have not yet materialized. Usually true.
pending.title: pending

FoaasMessage.description:
The ancestral FOAAS wire format, preserved byte-for-byte in spirit.
Every consequence, no matter how severe, can be expressed as a `message`
and a `subtitle`. That was FOAAS's great insight. This interface is FROZEN
in homage — changes require a séance with the FOAAS maintainers.
Mirror of `asyncapi.yaml#/components/schemas/FoaasMessage`.

subtitle.description: MUST begin with "- ". This is not negotiable; it is the whole homage.
subtitle.title: subtitle

FoaasMessage.title: FoaasMessage

FuckAroundInput.description:
Input for `fuck_around` ← `asyncapi.yaml#/operations/declareIntent`.
The Intent payload ⊕ the channel parameter (B1). Headers (`fafoId`,
`occurredAt`, `sequence`) are server-populated — agents do not get to
choose their own causality.

actorId.description:
Stable identifier of the actor doing the fucking-around. Consequences are
partitioned by this value and never rebalance to another actor.
actorId.title: actorId

description.description: What, precisely, you are about to do. Be honest. The log is forever.
description.title: description

recklessness.description:
Self-assessed recklessness. The scale goes to eleven. The Bureau
recalibrates self-assessments upward by a factor derived from the phrase
"how hard can it be" appearing in `description`.
recklessness.title: recklessness

safeguardsClaimed.description:
Safeguards the actor believes are in place. Recorded verbatim for
comedic value during the retro. Ignored by the severity engine.
safeguardsClaimed.title: safeguardsClaimed

warningsDisregarded.description: Warnings already received and ignored before declaring.
warningsDisregarded.title: warningsDisregarded

witnesses.description: Actors or channels who will receive ToldYouSo broadcasts.
witnesses.title: witnesses

FuckAroundOutput.description:
Result of `fuck_around`. Returned immediately (B3): the consequence itself
arrives later on `fafo://findout/{actorId}`, correlated by `_meta.fafoId`.

fafoId.description:
The Thread of Causality. Links every event in a single
around → warning → escalation → findout → lesson lifecycle.
Assigned by the fabric at intent declaration; immutable thereafter.
fafoId.title: fafoId

predictedSeverity.description: The Bureau's forecast. MUST be shown even when the user approved without reading.
predictedSeverity.title: predictedSeverity

warningsIssued.description: Warnings issued in response to this declaration.
warningsIssued.title: warningsIssued

willDoItAgainAnyway.description: The honesty field. Feeds the Recidivism Index.

ToldYouSoInput.description:
Input for `told_you_so` — the FOAAS memorial tool. Exactly the two
parameters the ancestral `/off/:name/:from` took. A closed, perfect form.

ToldYouSoOutput.description:
The ancestral FOAAS wire format, preserved byte-for-byte in spirit.
Every consequence, no matter how severe, can be expressed as a `message`
and a `subtitle`. That was FOAAS's great insight. This interface is FROZEN
in homage — changes require a séance with the FOAAS maintainers.
Mirror of `asyncapi.yaml#/components/schemas/FoaasMessage`.

Warning.description:
An advisory event. Structurally incapable of preventing anything.
Mirror of `asyncapi.yaml#/components/schemas/Warning`.

heeded.description:
Whether the warning was heeded. A boolean for schema hygiene and a
constant for historical accuracy.
heeded.title: heeded

predictedSeverity.description: The Bureau's forecast of the eventual finding-out.
predictedSeverity.title: predictedSeverity

source.description: Where the warning came from. All sources are equally ignorable.
source.title: source
